Contact

Discuss a mandate.

Use this form to discuss an architecture review, advisory engagement, technical documentation package, platform design, AI systems architecture, or delivery governance mandate.

Email
hello@rbayoub.com
LinkedIn
linkedin.com/in/rbayoub

Submitting opens your email client. Include context, constraints, timeline, and whether the work is advisory, design-only, or delivery-supported. You may also write directly to hello@rbayoub.com.

RB AYOUB Solutions Inc.

Senior architecture for complex systems.

Based in Laval, Québec.
